      "id": 1,
      "heading": "[Scene 1 - Shaji Pappan Wins, Loses, and Finds Pinky]",
      "narration": "Shaji Pappan and his team win a tug-of-war tournament, but their prize, a female goat named Pinky, might be more trouble than it's worth. Shaji's face: pure stress. The audience: howling. Shaji's back pain: activated.",
      "mood": "absurd",
      "duration_seconds": 20,
      "visual_note": "Quick cuts of the tug-of-war, followed by a comedic shot of Pinky the goat"
    },
    {
      "id": 2,
      "heading": "[Scene 2 - Satan Xavier Enters with Drama]",
      "narration": "Satan Xavier, the most extra villain, appears with a plan that will somehow, definitely not work. He thinks Shaji Pappan's team has stolen something valuable. The team is like, 'Uh, no, we just have a really cute goat.'",
      "mood": "funny",
      "duration_seconds": 25,
      "visual_note": "Over-the-top entrance for Satan Xavier, complete with dramatic music"
    },
    {
      "id": 3,
      "heading": "[Scene 3 - Abu's Explosives Go Boom (Not in a Good Way)]",
      "narration": "Abu's explosive experiments go off with a bang, literally. His experiments are the real MVPs of chaos. Shaji Pappan's back pain: still a thing.",
      "mood": "chaotic",

    },
    {
      "id": 4,
      "heading": "[Scene 4 - Neelakoduveli, the Miracle Plant]",
      "narration": "The team hears about Neelakoduveli, a mystic plant that brings wealth. Because, of course, they need more ways to get into trouble. Satan Xavier and Dude are also on the hunt, because why not?",
      "mood": "absurd",
      "duration_seconds": 30,
      "visual_note": "A map or animation showing the various factions searching for Neelakoduveli"
    },
    {
      "id": 5,
      "heading": "[Scene 5 - Road Trip of Chaos and Misunderstandings]",
      "narration": "The hunt for Neelakoduveli turns into a road trip of double-crosses and absurd misunderstandings. Shaji Pappan's iconic red and black mundu makes an appearance, symbolizing bad luck and unmatched swagger.",
      "mood": "funny",
      "duration_seconds": 40,
      "visual_note": "Montage of the road trip, showcasing the team's antics and Satan Xavier's over-the-top villainy"
    },
    {
      "id": 6,
      "heading": "[Scene 6 - Foolproof Plans and Epic Fails]",
      "narration": "The team comes up with 'foolproof' plans that fail epically. Abu's explosives still don't work as planned. Dude's hyper-machismo reaches new heights. It's a miracle they survive their own adventures.",

      "duration_seconds": 35,

      "id": 7,
      "heading": "[Scene 7 - The Final Showdown of Chaos]",
      "narration": "The final showdown is a mess of epic proportions. Everyone's after Neelakoduveli, but mostly they're just after each other. Shaji Pappan's back pain is the real hero, though.",
      "mood": "absurd",

  "closing_line": "In the end, it's not about the Neelakoduveli or the money; it's about how Shaji Pappan's back survived all this chaos.",
